channel.title: Deals on Deal Ledger
channel.description: Recent content in Deals on Deal Ledger

item.title: HyperX Cloud III Gaming Headset
item.description: Wired HyperX Cloud III headset with clear mic pickup and multi-platform support.

item.title: KAIGERR 15.6-inch Gaming Laptop
item.description: 15.6-inch laptop deal positioned for gaming and everyday performance use.

item.title: Ingnok 15.6-inch FHD Portable Monitor
item.description: 15.6-inch portable FHD monitor for travel, remote work, and dual-screen setups.

item.title: gianotter Desk Organizer
item.description: Compact desktop organizer for office accessories and stationery.

item.title: Spacrea Desk Organizer Set
item.description: Desk accessories organizer set for cleaner workspace storage.

item.title: Logitech MX Vertical Wireless Mouse
item.description: Ergonomic vertical wireless mouse designed to reduce wrist strain.

item.title: GIGABYTE B650 Gaming X AX V2 Motherboard
item.description: AM5 B650 motherboard deal for new Ryzen desktop builds.

item.title: Ray-Ban Meta Wayfarer Smart Glasses
item.description: Ray-Ban Meta Wayfarer smart glasses with camera capture and open-ear audio.

item.title: Sony HT-S100F Soundbar
item.description: Compact Sony soundbar with integrated tweeter and Bluetooth support.

item.title: Samsung Essential 27-inch Monitor
item.description: 27-inch Samsung monitor deal for desk setups and everyday productivity use.

item.title: Soundcore Life Q30 Noise-Cancelling Headphones
item.description: Wireless over-ear ANC headphones with strong battery life and comfort-first design.

item.title: Amazon Fire TV Stick HD
item.description: Compact streaming stick for HD TV apps and voice control.

item.title: Corsair RM1000e Power Supply
item.description: 1000W fully modular ATX power supply for high-performance PC builds.

item.title: Anker MagSafe Charging Station
item.description: Foldable MagSafe-compatible stand for multi-device charging.

item.title: LEGO Bugatti Vision GT
item.description: LEGO Speed Champions Bugatti set for display or build play.

item.title: BONTEC Monitor Stand Riser
item.description: Desk monitor riser with storage shelf and ergonomic lift.

item.title: Noise-cancelling over-ears
item.description: Wireless Sony ANC headphones with long battery life.

item.title: soundcore Noise Cancelling Headphones
item.description: Adaptive ANC headphones with 50-hour battery life.

item.title: CORSAIR HS80 RGB Wireless Headset
item.description: Wireless Dolby Atmos headset for console and PC.

item.title: ELIVED Full-Motion TV Wall Bracket
item.description: Full-motion TV wall bracket for 14-42 inch screens.

item.title: Compact mechanical keyboard
item.description: Full-size RGB keyboard with media controls.

item.title: Anker Magnetic Wireless Power Bank
item.description: Magnetic 5,000mAh power bank for iPhone top-ups.

item.title: ULTIMEA Soundbar with Subwoofer
item.description: 5.1 soundbar system with subwoofer and rear speakers.

item.title: Anker Qi Wireless Charging Pad
item.description: Qi charging pad for desk and bedside phone charging.
